nodes.label: Mittler Senior Technology Website After Redesign
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: A full-page screenshot of the redesigned Mittler Senior Technology website. The hero section features bold white headline text 'Technology Education for Senior Citizens' over a blurred background image (the hero-bg photo of a young tutor at a computer). Below the headline is a short tagline and two prominent CTA buttons labeled 'For Seniors' and 'For Organizations' in green. Below the hero are four stat tiles showing '3,500+ Seniors Impacted', '450+ Classes Taught', '150+ Teens Inspired', '10+ Countries Reached'. A 'Classes & Services' section heading appears below. The navigation bar is clean with white background, green logo, and right-aligned nav links including a 'Sponsor a Class' CTA button in green. INFERRED: The redesign emphasizes social proof, clarity, and audience segmentation (seniors vs. organizations). The green color palette aligns with the existing brand. The layout is modern, spacious, and conversion-focused with statistics driving credibility.
nodes.visual_tone: modern, clean, credibility-focused, green brand palette

edges.note: The hero-bg photo is visibly used as the blurred background image in the after-redesign hero section
Both are case study assets in the same portfolio; both use full-bleed photography as hero backgrounds for mission-driven organizations
